description: WooCommerce DB/API performance fuzzer gap report workload contract over available fuzz/run artifacts through Homeboy's generic artifact-postprocess primitive.
boundary_note: The Woo helper provides product policy while Homeboy owns the generic artifact-postprocess runner contract. Proven status requires reviewer-facing artifact refs from an approved offloaded run.

compare.rest: registered WooCommerce routes minus generated safe request cases and schema/query attribution rows
compare.database: WooCommerce database inventory and REST DB query profiles minus route, table, option, transient, and lookup attribution rows
compare.performance_hotspots: declared WooCommerce performance hotspot focus areas minus hotspot summary evidence refs

required_refs: reviewer-facing coverage gap report artifact ref
